chapter_title.en: Chapter 6 – The Cresent and the witnessing upon it

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول مرفوع - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (6/230)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول مرفوع - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (6/230)

parts.text: مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ الْحَسَنِ بْنِ أَبِي خَالِدٍ

text: إِذَا صَحَّ هِلَالُ شَهْرِ رَجَبٍ فَعُدَّ تِسْعَةً وَ خَمْسِينَ يَوْماً وَ صُمْ يَوْمَ السِّتِّينَ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Isa, from Hamza Abu Ya’la, from Muhammad Bin Al Hassan Bin Abu Khalid, raising it,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup>: ‘When the new moon of the month of Rajab holds good, so count fifty nine days and Fast on the sixtieth (day)’.
en.sarwar: 8. A number of our people have narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn ‘Isa from Hamzah ibn abu Ya‘liy from Muhammad ibn al- Hassan ibn abu Khalid in a marfu‘ manner who has said the following: “He (the Imam), ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘If the crescent of the month of Rajab is established, then count fifty nine days and fast the sixtieth day.’”
